title: Pseudodiplospora andamanica
taxonomy: Pseudodiplospora andamanica is classified under the family Gomphillaceae and is a species of fungus. It belongs to the genus Pseudodiplospora. The classification of Pseudodiplospora andamanica is further categorized under the class Ascomycetes, and the phylum Ascomycota. This classification is based on its morphological and molecular characteristics. Pseudodiplospora andamanica is a rare species found in the Andaman and Nicobar Islands.
